title: U-Net, Section by Section
tagline: Why the same architecture wins at biomedical segmentation, satellite parsing, and modern diffusion
summary: Watch a synthetic image flow through an encoder, lose 16× of its spatial resolution, then climb back up — once with skip connections at every scale and once without. Toggle the skips off mid-decoder and watch the segmentation mask blur. Then peek at the same U inside Stable Diffusion's denoiser.
highlights: Live encoder-decoder forward pass on a synthetic shape; toggle skip connections at any scale.
Side-by-side: predicted mask with vs without skips — the gap is exactly the spatial detail the encoder threw away.
Per-scale feature thumbnails so you can see where structure lives inside the U.
Zoom-out: the same U-shaped denoiser inside Stable Diffusion.
